message:
feat(fp-conformance): add DataFrame arithmetic/comparison property tests (frankenpandas-s6d)

Add 9 new property-based tests covering DataFrame operations:
- add_scalar: no-panic, shape preservation, add(0) identity
- mul_scalar: mul(1) identity
- add_df: result index contains union of both inputs, result columns
  contain union of both inputs
- eq_scalar_df: produces all-Bool output
- comparison ops: shape preservation for all 6 ops (eq/ne/gt/ge/lt/le)
- eq/ne complementarity: eq(x) XOR ne(x) == true for non-NaN values

Total property tests now at 66, all green. Workspace clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
